feed.title: Chinese Journal of Applied Linguistics
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Chinese Journal of Applied Linguistics (De Gruyter)

entry.title: The Time Course of Chinese-English Bilinguals’ L2 Activation During L1 Semantic and Orthographic Tasks

entry.title: Advancing English Engagement Measurement: An Adapted Scale Incorporating Social Engagement for Secondary Learners

entry.title: Pedagogy of Appropriation: A Rhythmanalysis of a Flipped University ELT Classroom in China
entry.summary: Authors: Yongjian Luo, Simeng Li DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/CJAL-2026-0405 Pages: Page range: 213-235

entry.title: A Frame-Based Analysis of Exemplification in Applied Linguistics Research Articles
entry.summary: Authors: Yingliang Liu, Caihong Li DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/CJAL-2026-0401 Pages: Page range: 236-254

entry.title: A Narrative Inquiry of a University English Teacher’s Emotional Experience and Identity Construction in Mobile-Assisted Language Learning

entry.title: Evaluating ChatGPT’s Role in Chinese Learner’s Dictionary Compilation: A Comparative Analysis
